calendar.matters:
And Notice Of Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Jul-30-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. JAMES M. MILLAR OF MILLAR & ASSOCIATES, TEL. NO. 981-8100 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF AND MOVING PARTY;
NO OTHER APPEARANCE ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT VACATED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS- PLAINTIFF FENTRESS HILL'S Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement IS GRANTED. THERE WAS A VALID PROOF OF SERVICE. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano , CSR # 8600 =301/PJM

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-23-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-23-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES FOR MON, APR-23-20007, UNLAWFUL DETAINER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT WITH TERMS PLACED ON THE RECORD: JAMES MILLAR, ESQ FOR PLAINTIFF MR. FENTRESS HILL; DEFENDANT MS. JEWELL SPARKS APPEARS ON HER OWN BEHALF THIS DAY IN PROPRIA PERSONA.
ATTORNEY FOR PLAINTIFF INFORMS THE COURT PARTIES HAVE REACHED A SETTLEMENT IN THE MATTER; TERMS OF THE SETTLEMENT ARE PLACED ON THE RECORD, TO WIT: PARTIES ENTER INTO A STIPULATED AGREEMENT FOR DEFENDANT SPARKS TO VACATE THE PREMISE LOCATED AT 175 WOOD STREET, #2, SAN FRANCISCO, CA BY MAY 15, 2007 ON OR BEFORE 5:00PM; DEFENDANT SPARKS AGREES TO ENTER INTO A PAYMENT SCHEDULE TO PLAINTIFF IN ORDER FOR DEFENDANT SPARKS TO RE-PAY THE AMOUNT OF TWELVE THOUSAND DOLLARS ($12,000.00) TO PLAINTIFF IN SEVEN PAYMENTS OF $1,230.00 EACH ON THE FOLLOWING DATES: JUNE-15-2007; JUL-20-2007; AUG-17-2007; SEPT-21-2007; OCT-19-2007; NOV-16-2007, AND DEC-21-2007. IF ALL PAYMENTS ARE PAID IN FULL ACCORDING TO PAYMENT PLAN, PLAINTIFF WILL DISMISS THE ACTION. IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO ADHERE TO PAYMENT SCHEDULE LISTED ABOVE, PLAINTIFF WILL ENTER JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT AS FOLLOWS: FULL RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 175 WOOD STREET, #2, S.F., CA; JUDGMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $12,600.00 LESS CREDIT PAID; STIPULATED PAYMENT OF ATTORNEY FEES OF $2,500.00, IN ADDITION TO ANY ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS IF ANY ENFORCEMENT OF SETTLEMENT IS NECESSARY; EACH PARTY TO BEAR OWN COSTS; GENERAL RELEASE (1542CCP); LANDLORD AGREES TO GIVE 48-HR NOTICE TO DEFENDANT IF NEED TO SHOW PROPERTY; LANDLORD TO GIVE A NEUTRAL REFERENCE FOR DEFENDANT SPARKS; SECURITY DEPOSIT OF $4,000.00 IS TO BE RETAINED BY PLAINTIFF; ANY PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT WILL BE CONSIDERED ABANDONED; BOTH PARTIES INFORM COURT THEY UNDERSTAND & AGREE TO TERMS OF SETTLEMENT; P/A TO PREPARE STIPULATED AGREEMENT FOR SIGNATURES. D-206 TRIAL DATE VACATED; JUDGE: JAMES A. ROBERTSON, II; REPORTER: DENISE L. DOUCETTE, CSR #5963; CLK M.MANZELLA (D-220)

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-18-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: JPT Will Chen, Clerk Karissa Shaw, Not reported. (218)

APPEARANCES:
Plaintiff Fentress Hill is present.
James Millar representing the plaintiff.
Defendant Jewell Sparks is present.
Limited Scope Representation: S. Lanay Newsom

This matter comes on calendar for a settlement conference. Parties confer privately with the Judge Pro Tem. Case did not settle, trial date remains set.
